assertions.title: Submit assessment responses

steps.action: Code analysis of submitAssessment server function
steps.expected: Assessment responses saved to database, redirect to results
steps.observed: Code implements: saveAssessmentResponse creates/updates records, submitAssessment finalizes and calculates scores

steps.expected: Form submission saves responses and redirects to results
steps.observed: handleSubmitFinal saves responses via saveAssessmentResponse, calls submitAssessment, redirects to /assessments/:id/results

codeAnalysis.submitAssessment: Saves responses to assessment_responses table, calculates scores
codeAnalysis.saveAssessmentResponse: Creates or updates response records with answer_text and selected_option_id

assertions.issues: Browser automation unavailable: libatk-1.0.so.0 library missing from system. Cannot launch Chromium headless shell.

assertions.title: Objective scoring

steps.action: Code analysis of scoring logic in submitAssessment
steps.expected: Objective questions scored based on is_correct flag in question_options
steps.observed: Code calculates objectiveScore based on question_options.is_correct and score_value. Essay questions tracked separately.
assessments.$id.results.tsx displays Total Skor, Skor Objektif, Skor Esai, and per-question scoring

codeAnalysis.scoringLogic: For non-essay questions: if selected option is_correct, adds score_value * weight
codeAnalysis.objectiveScore: Calculated from correct answers on single_choice, multiple_choice, rating, boolean, date

assertions.issues: Browser automation unavailable: libatk-1.0.so.0 library missing from system. Cannot launch Chromium headless shell.

frictions.description: Browser tool (agent-browser) could not launch due to missing libatk-1.0.so.0 library on the system
frictions.resolution: Attempted install --with-deps but requires sudo which is not available

blockers.description: agent-browser cannot launch Chromium due to missing libatk-1.0.so.0 shared library. System dependencies installation requires sudo permissions which are not available.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Tried agent-browser install --with-deps, but sudo authentication required. Attempted npx playwright install-deps chromium which also failed.
blockers.errorDetails: /home/riz/.cache/ms-playwright/chromium_headless_shell-1208/chrome-headless-shell-linux64/chrome-headless-shell: error while loading shared libraries: libatk-1.0.so.0: cannot open shared object file: No such file or directory

summary: Assertions VAL-ASSESS-004 and VAL-ASSESS-005 are blocked due to browser automation infrastructure failure. Code analysis confirms: 1) Assessment submission saves responses to assessment_responses table with proper scoring logic, 2) Objective scoring uses is_correct flag from question_options to calculate scores, 3) Results page displays total score, objective score, and essay score breakdown. Manual browser testing required to verify actual submission flow.
